title: baccharis kessleri
intro: Baccharis kessleri, also known as Kessler's silver broom or Baccharis kessleri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Baccharis kessleri include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Baccharis kessleri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
